data.name: Sensual Adventures - The Game
data.detailed_description:
Brittany and Trinity are back in a new game from Puppetmaster! The girls are stuck in the apartment until their flight to Cairo and there's only one thing to do until then...
Fuck anywhere and everywhere. Help the girls pound each other and bring on the cum in this new 3DX Game!

What's Included:

  • 5 Story Mode Chapters! Get to know the girls through dialogues and quests
  • 3 characters: Brittany, Trinity, and Jasmine!
  • Outstanding graphics and animations!
  • DLC Assets & Customization included! 180+ Options total!
  • Balls/no balls option
  • Fitness & Wetness strength slider
  • Veins on Dick strength slider
  • Colour picker for Skin, Hair, Eyes, Lips
  • Great Cumshots!
  • Immersive Perspective -> you are really there with the Girls!
  • Adjustable graphic settings for best performance
  • 17 hot Positions that will make you explode ;)
  • Interactive 3D game: Choose the positions, who’s on top, and when to cum!
  • But not too Interactive: Auto-Camera mode so you have both hands free! ;)
  • Plus Hotkeys for UI actions
  • Hide the UI for a perfect immersion


Minimum System Requirements Version:64-bit processor and operating system.
OS: Windows 10.
Processor: INTEL i5, AMD Ryzen 3.
Memory: 8 GB RAM.
Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060, AMD Radeon RX 570.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Win 10
  • 處理器: INTEL i5, AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體

  • 備註: Win7 & Win8 should also work
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
